facebook.caption:
POV: you booked a resort on Đường Bào and had no idea what was waiting for you.

Sailing Club Signature Resort Phu Quoc. 4.9 stars. 4,584 reviews. That number doesn't lie.

The kind of place where you check in for two nights and start rescheduling your flight home. Beachfront. Polished. Genuinely hard to leave.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 4,584 people gave this resort 4.9 stars. Walking through Sailing Club Signature Resort Phu Quoc, it's obvious why. Watch till the end.
